steps.text:
The bridge ahead is ancient and rotting. The boards creak and sway with each gust of wind, gaps yawning between planks over a rushing river far below.
It feels like it could give way at any moment.

exit.travel_text: You decide not to risk it and pick your way along the riverbank, looking for a safer crossing.

press_on.text:
You step onto the bridge. Each board groans and flexes under your weight. The whole structure sways...[wait=0.2]
...[wait=0.1]
...[wait=0.1]

steps.text: You keep your weight balanced and move quickly from board to board. You're barely across when the final plank splinters into the water below!

exit.travel_text: You dash the last few steps off the bridge and continue down the road, heart still pounding.

steps.text: Halfway across, the bridge gives way with a sickening crack. The boards vanish beneath your feet and you plunge into the rushing water below!

exit.travel_text: The current drags you downstream through the rapids.

steps.text: The fog swallows the path whole. You can't see your own feet.
White mist closes in from every side at once. There's no direction left to pick.
You press on, but the world beyond arm's reach simply isn't there anymore.
Somewhere close, the fog seems to shift around something solid. Then it's gone.

then.text: The fog feels thinner than it did.
The fog thins at last, and for the first time, the path ahead doesn't disappear.

exit.travel_text: You break free of the fog, the ground growing firmer with every step.
The fog closes back in behind you. You're still lost.
